title: vex_sim playground
description: A bounded 2D world (walls, painted floor regions, robot start pose) with optional success criteria for the scenario runner. Loaded by vex_sim.playground_loader.

name.description: Stable identifier; used by --playground on the CLI.

description.description: Free text shown in --list and embedded in scenario results. Use this to recommend a sensor mount_height for the playground.

robot_start.description: [x_mm, y_mm, theta_rad]. theta=pi/2 faces +y (up on screen).

height.description: Wall height in mm. 'low'=30, 'mid'=100, 'tall'=200. Default if omitted: 'tall'. Distance sensors only see walls where height >= sensor mount_height.

name.description: Names a zone for reach_zone / visit_sequence success criteria. Anonymous regions are visual / optical-sensor only.

color.description: Canonical names: red, green, blue, yellow, orange, purple, cyan, white, black.

shape.description: If omitted, inferred from whether 'bounds' or 'points' is set.

bounds.description: [x, y, w, h] in mm; bottom-left anchor.

goal.description: Scenario success criteria, evaluated by the scenario runner.

type.description: reach_zone: pass when robot enters 'zone'. visit_sequence: pass when robot enters every entry of 'zones' in order.

time_limit.description: Max simulated seconds. Run fails if the clock crosses this before the success rule is met.

forbid_collisions.description: If true, any wall collision fails the run. Default false.
